The 2020 results also mark the sixth consecutive year in which payment volume climbed by more than one billion, and the eighth year in a row with a value increase of m

The notes, which are additional notes of the series originally issued on Aug. 19, 2019, were priced at 109.678% of par, with a re-offer yield of 3.418%. The partnership intends to use the net proceeds from this offering of approximately $322 million, after deducting underwriting discounts, estimated offering expenses and accrued interest, for general partnership purposes, which may include repayment of indebtedness, including borrowings under its revolving credit facility and commercial paper program, capital expenditures and repurchases of its common units. INPUT.event_text: B. Riley Financial Declares Preferred Stock Dividends LOS ANGELES, Jan. 11, 2021 /PRNewswire/ --B. Riley Financial, Inc.(NASDAQ: RILY) ("B.
